name: Apollo.io
shortDescription: A comprehensive sales intelligence and lead enrichment integration that connects Apollo's prospecting database with automated workflows. This extension enables AI-powered lead qualification, contact data verification, and systematic engagement processes for building targeted prospect lists and managing outreach campaigns.

actions.name: Enrich Person
actions.description: Enriches a person's profile using Apollo for AI-powered lead qualification and contact data verification. Ideal for AI agents building prospect lists, validating contact information before outreach, or enriching CRM data with comprehensive professional details including employment history, contact info, and social profiles.

actions.name: Enrich People
actions.description: Enriches up to 100 people using Apollo's Bulk Enrichment endpoint.

actions.name: Enrich Organization
actions.description: Enriches a company using its domain.

actions.name: People Search
actions.description: Search and filter people using Apollo's advanced search for AI-driven prospecting and lead generation. Perfect for AI agents building targeted prospect lists, researching potential customers by job title/seniority/location, or finding decision-makers within specific companies and industries.

actions.name: Search Organizations
actions.description: Search and filter companies using Apollo's comprehensive database for AI-powered market research and account-based marketing. Ideal for AI agents identifying target companies by size/revenue/technology stack, building account lists for outreach campaigns, or researching market segments and competitor landscapes.

actions.name: Get Organization Job Postings
actions.description: Retrieve public job postings for a specific organization using its Apollo ID.

actions.name: Create Task
actions.description: Creates task assignments for Apollo contacts, enabling AI agents to automate follow-up workflows and schedule outreach activities. Perfect for building systematic engagement processes, assigning manual review tasks, or triggering human touchpoints in automated sequences.

actions.name: Get a List of Users
actions.description: Retrieve the IDs and info for all users (teammates) in your Apollo account. These IDs are used in operations like Create Task, Create Deal, and more.

actions.name: Search Sequences
actions.description: Search for Apollo sequences using a text query and pagination options.

actions.name: Add Contacts to Sequence
actions.description: Add one or more contacts to an Apollo sequence using their IDs.

actions.name: Search Contacts
actions.description: Search for contacts that have been added to your Apollo account, using filters like keyword, stage, and sort order.

idealUseCases: Building AI agents for automated lead qualification and prospecting
Enriching CRM data with comprehensive professional contact details
Creating targeted prospect lists using advanced search filters
Automating follow-up workflows and scheduling outreach activities
Conducting market research and competitor landscape analysis
Managing account-based marketing campaigns with systematic engagement
Validating contact information before outreach campaigns
